about_quotes.speaker: Glenn Zottola
about_quotes.evidence: I’m busier than ever with Chick and this guitar, do you know this guy Romero Lubambo? ... I heard, you recorded something with him?
about_quotes.doc_title: Glenn Zottola interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, December 7, 2020
